title: quercus miyagii
intro: Quercus miyagii, also known as Miyagi oak, is a deciduous tree species native to Japan. It is a member of the Fagaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties. The leaves and bark of the Quercus miyagii plant are traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Quercus miyagii leaves and bark can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Japanese medicine.
